summary: Phase 27 is FULLY EXECUTED (4/4 plans, commits 7f2e162..7236c87 + 1e5a7f6/bab65d8 fixes) and qa-VERIFIED status:passed (27-VERIFICATION.md, commit a357942 — 6/6 must-haves, HARDEN-01 + HARDEN-02). It is NOT marked complete in ROADMAP/STATE because `anvil-cc phase complete 27` fails closed on the anvil §13.2 close-gate (manifest_unresolved[gsd/workflows/execute-phase.md]). The autonomous run (/anvil-autonomous --from 27) was stopped by the user to resolve the gsd→anvil migration; a manifest fix attempt (anvil-up) errored. Phase work is complete and trustworthy; only the anvil bookkeeping gate blocks.

remaining_tasks.name: Resolve anvil §13.2 close-gate so `anvil-cc phase complete 27` succeeds
remaining_tasks.detail: The gate looks for an in-project workflow manifest at ./gsd/workflows/execute-phase.md (ENOENT — project has no gsd/ dir; anvil workflows live in ~/.claude/anvil/workflows/). Options: (a) create the expected gsd/workflows/*.md manifest(s); (b) fix `anvil-up`; (c) bypass with manual bookkeeping. Same gate blocks phases 28/29 + milestone-complete.

remaining_tasks.name: Mark Phase 27 complete (ROADMAP [x] + date, advance STATE to 28, HARDEN-01/02 -> validated in REQUIREMENTS)
remaining_tasks.detail: Either via `anvil-cc phase complete 27` once the gate resolves, or manually.

remaining_tasks.name: Milestone v1.6 lifecycle: audit -> complete -> cleanup (after 27-29)

blockers.description: anvil-cc phase/milestone complete fails closed on missing in-project manifest gsd/workflows/execute-phase.md (gsd->anvil migration artifact). Blocks marking Phase 27 complete and the whole milestone tail.
blockers.workaround: Manual bookkeeping (ROADMAP/STATE/REQUIREMENTS by hand) replicates phase-complete minus the gate; OR create the gsd/workflows manifest(s); OR fix the anvil onboarding/anvil-up setup.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide how to clear the anvil close-gate (set up manifest / fix anvil-up / authorize manual-bookkeeping bypass)
human_actions_pending.context: User stopped the autonomous run to resolve the gsd->anvil migration rather than bypass the gate. Their `anvil-up` attempt errored (Claude CLI --print needs a prompt).

decisions.rationale: CR-02: plain bool can't distinguish unset from explicit-false, so a yaml-persisted `canvasNoise: false` was clobbered by the default-true baseline. *bool honors precedence: explicit flag > non-nil yaml value (incl. false) > default true. Proven by TestResolveStealth_HardeningTogglesRoundTrip.

decisions.decision: CanvasNoise toggle gates BOTH canvas and audio noise
decisions.rationale: profileFromStealth sets SpoofCanvas + SpoofAudioContext from cfg.Stealth.CanvasNoise; one user-facing knob for the readback-noise surfaces.

decisions.decision: Session noise seed on the Context (crypto/rand), not Config
decisions.rationale: launchBrowser takes Config by value, so a seed there can't propagate; generated once in NewContext gives a stable per-session seed across all createPage calls (HARDEN-02 stability).
consumed via replace => ../godoll; phases 24-26 pattern; the CR-01 audio fix lives in ../godoll/stealth/js.go.

decisions.decision: Stopped the autonomous run at the close-gate rather than bypassing
decisions.rationale: User chose to resolve the gsd->anvil migration; phase work is done/verified, only the anvil gate blocks.

rod-cli.yaml + tests/test_upload.txt (runtime/test artifacts — do NOT commit)

next_action: Decide how to clear the anvil §13.2 close-gate (manifest setup / fix anvil-up / authorize manual bookkeeping). Then mark Phase 27 complete and resume /anvil-autonomous --from 28. Do NOT re-execute phase 27 — its plans are done (SUMMARYs present) and qa-verified; the only outstanding work is the completion bookkeeping blocked by the gate.
context_notes: Mid gsd->anvil migration: skills/agents switched to anvil-* and the model to Opus 4.8 mid-session. anvil-cc is the new CLI (replaces gsd-tools for lifecycle). On opus the lead plans in-band and delegates execute->engineer, verify->qa. Operational traps carried from phase 26 and respected this session: (1) `go build -o rod-cli .` before any runCli test (tests exec the prebuilt binary); (2) `pkill -9 -x rod-cli`, NEVER `pkill -f` (self-matches shell); (3) never kill the user's interactive Chromium /usr/lib/chromium; (4) never run full `go test ./...` (timeout + flaky daemon_more_test). All targeted suites are green at this pause: TestDetectionHarness (incl. webrtc_ice/canvas_noise_stable/audio_noise_stable), TestNetworkEvasionHeaders, ./types (incl. round-trip test), ./actions, godoll ./stealth.
